title: Federation Common Definitions
description: Reusable schema components shared across different federation types (SAML 2.0, OIDC, WS-Federation). These definitions can be referenced from other federation schemas using $ref.

KeyIdentifier.description: SSL certificate database and label reference.

BasicConfiguration.description: Basic OIDC provider configuration using metadata endpoint or manual configuration.

metadata_endpoint_url.description: The /metadata endpoint URL of the provider. Only valid if active_delegate_id is 'metadataEndpointUrl'.

issuer_identifier.description: The issuer 'iss' value of the provider. Only valid if active_delegate_id is 'noMetadata'.

response_types.description: List of response types which determines which flow to be executed. Only valid if active_delegate_id is 'noMetadata'.

authorization_endpoint_url.description: The /authorize endpoint URL of the provider. Only valid if active_delegate_id is 'noMetadata'.

token_endpoint_url.description: The /token endpoint URL of the provider. Required if 'code' response type is selected. Only valid if active_delegate_id is 'noMetadata'.

user_info_endpoint_url.description: The /userinfo endpoint URL of the provider. Only valid if active_delegate_id is 'noMetadata'.

mapping_rule.description: A reference to an ID or name of an advance configuration mapping rule.

rule_type.description: The type of the mapping rule.

attribute_types.description: Types of attributes to include in the assertion. An asterisk (*) indicates all attribute types. Default is ['*'].

session_not_on_or_after.description: Number of seconds that the security context should be discarded by the service provider.

create_multiple_attribute_statements.description: Whether to keep multiple attribute statements in the groups in which they were received.

valid_before.description: Number of seconds before the issue date that an assertion is considered valid.

valid_after.description: Number of seconds the assertion is valid after being issued.

AssertionConsumerService.description: SAML Assertion Consumer Service endpoint configuration.

binding.description: Communication method used to transport SAML messages.

default.description: Whether this is the default endpoint.

ArtifactResolutionService.description: SAML Artifact Resolution Service endpoint configuration.

binding.description: Communication method used to transport SAML messages.

default.description: Whether this is the default endpoint.

url.description: The URL of the endpoint. If not provided, automatically generated from point of contact URL.

EncryptionSettings.description: Encryption settings for SAML messages and assertions.

block_algorithm.description: Block encryption algorithm used to encrypt and decrypt SAML messages.

key_transport_algorithm.description: Key transport algorithm used to encrypt and decrypt keys.

key_identifier.description: The certificate for encryption of outgoing SAML messages.

decryption_key_identifier.description: A public/private key pair for decrypting incoming messages.

encrypt_name_id.description: Whether the name identifiers should be encrypted.

IdentityMapping.description: Identity mapping configuration for transforming identities between federation partners.

active_delegate_id.description: The active mapping module instance. Valid values are ``skip-identity-map``, ``default-map`` and ``default-http-custom-map``.

properties.description: The mapping module specific properties. Use Default_Mapping_Properties (rule_type, mapping_rule) when active_delegate_id is 'default-map'. Use Custom_Mapping_Properties (applies_to, auth_type, basic_auth_username, basic_auth_password, client_key_store, client_key_alias, issuer_uri, message_format, ssl_key_store, uri) when active_delegate_id is 'default-http-custom-map'.

rule_type.description: The type of the mapping rule. The only supported type currently is ``JAVASCRIPT``.

mapping_rule.description: A reference to an ID or name of a mapping rule.

applies_to.description: Refers to STS chain that consumes call-out response. Required if ``WSTRUST`` ``message_format`` is specified, invalid otherwise.

auth_type.description: Authentication method used when contacting external service. Supported values are ``NONE``, ``BASIC`` or ``CERTIFICATE``

basic_auth_username.description: Username for authentication to external service. Required if ``BASIC`` ``auth_type`` is specified, invalid otherwise.

basic_auth_password.description: Password for authentication to external service. Required if ``BASIC`` ``auth_type`` is specified, invalid otherwise.

client_key_store.description: Contains key for HTTPS client authentication. Required if ``CERTIFICATE`` ``auth_type`` is specified, invalid otherwise.

client_key_alias.description: Alias of the key for HTTPS client authentication. Required if ``CERTIFICATE`` ``auth_type`` is specified, invalid otherwise.

issuer_uri.description: Refers to STS chain that provides input for call-out request. Required if ``WSTRUST`` ``message_format`` is specified, invalid otherwise.

message_format.description: Message format of call-out request. Supported values are ``XML`` or ``WSTRUST``.

ssl_key_store.description: SSL certificate trust store to use when validating SSL certificate of external service.

uri.description: Address of destination server to call out to.

mapping_rule.description: A reference to an ID or name of an extension mapping rule.
A reference to an ID or name of an authentication request mapping rule.

binding.description: Communication method used to transport SAML messages.

url.description: The URL of the endpoint. For non-SOAP bindings, automatically generated from point of contact URL.

default.description: The name identifier format to use when format attribute is not set or is unspecified.

supported.description: List of supported name identifier formats.

SignatureSettings.description: Digital signature settings for SAML messages and assertions.

signature_algorithm.description: The signature algorithm to sign and validate SAML messages and assertions.

digest_algorithm.description: The hash algorithm to apply to the transformed resources.

sign_authn_response.description: Whether to sign the authentication responses.

sign_artifact_request.description: Whether to sign the artifact request.

sign_artifact_response.description: Whether to sign the artifact response.

sign_logout_request.description: Whether to sign the logout request.

sign_logout_response.description: Whether to sign the logout response.

sign_name_id_management_request.description: Whether to sign the name ID management request.

sign_name_id_management_response.description: Whether to sign the name ID management response.

validate_authn_request.description: Whether to validate the digital signature of an authentication request.

validate_assertion.description: Whether to validate the digital signature of an assertion.

validate_artifact_request.description: Whether to validate the digital signature of an artifact request.

validate_artifact_response.description: Whether to validate the digital signature of an artifact response.

validate_logout_request.description: Whether to validate the digital signature of a logout request.

validate_logout_response.description: Whether to validate the digital signature of a logout response.

validate_name_id_management_request.description: Whether to validate the digital signature of a name ID management request.

validate_name_id_management_response.description: Whether to validate the digital signature of a name ID management response.

include_inclusive_namespaces.description: Whether to include the InclusiveNamespaces element in the digital signature.

key_info_elements.description: KeyInfo elements to include in the digital signature.

include_public_key.description: Whether to include the public key in the KeyInfo element.

include_x509_certificate_data.description: Whether to include the base64 encoded certificate data in the KeyInfo element.

include_x509_issuer_details.description: Whether to include the issuer name and certificate serial number in the KeyInfo element.

include_x509_subject_key_identifier.description: Whether to include the X.509 subject key identifier in the KeyInfo element.

include_x509_subject_name.description: Whether to include the subject name in the KeyInfo element.

signing_key_identifier.description: A public/private key pair for signing the SAML messages and assertions.

validation_key_identifier.description: The certificate to use to validate the signatures on incoming SAML assertions and messages.

binding.description: Communication method used to transport SAML messages.

AliasServiceSettings.description: Alias service configuration for storing user aliases.

db_type.description: Whether the user's alias is stored in JDBC or LDAP.

ldap_connection.description: The LDAP Connection to store the alias.

ldap_base_dn.description: The LDAP BaseDN to search for the user.

SOAPSettings.description: SOAP communication settings for artifact resolution and other SOAP-based services.

label.description: The certificate label. If not provided, all certificates in the database will be trusted.

Runtime.description: Runtime connection details for WebSEAL or other runtime components.

username.description: The username used to authenticate with the runtime.

password.description: The password used to authenticate with the runtime.

port.description: The port of the runtime. Must be the SSL port.
